name: サトー
prompt:
Create a photorealistic cinematic full-body character portrait for a modern web novel. Preserve silhouette clarity, costume readability, realistic anatomy, realistic fabric texture, and a consistent live-action visual language shared with all other generated assets.
Full-body portrait of Sato for this specific jogging novel. Preserve the exact face, hair, beard, age, and body impression from the supplied canonical portrait: a 45-year-old Japanese man, slightly tall, lean athletic build, long black hair tied back in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, thoughtful rugged face. Redesign only the clothing into realistic early-April jogging wear for a cool Tokyo morning: light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, quality running shoes, sports watch, and a minimal running pouch if needed. He should feel calm, masculine, lived-in, practical, and naturally cool rather than sporty in a flashy way.
Keep the whole character visible within frame when possible, especially head, key costume details, hands, silhouette, and signature accessories.
Final delivery will be center-cropped to 1080x1920. Keep the face, silhouette, and signature costume details near the center with safe margins.
Negative prompt: anime, manga, cel shading, cartoon, text, logo, watermark, deformed anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate body parts, cropped head, doll-like face, young idol look, clean-shaven face, short hair, exaggerated bodybuilder muscles, flashy racing outfit, sleeveless summer wear, fantasy weapons, anime pretty-boy look, denim, leather boots, casual streetwear
